overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game depicting a character in Victorian-era clothing walking through a foggy, gas-lit London street at night. The character moves along a cobblestone riverside path before stopping at an intersection to observe a passing horse-drawn carriage.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy riverside walkway with gas lamps

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the cobblestone path beside the canal, moving toward an intersection

notable_agents.action: policeman in dark uniform and helmet walking in the opposite direction, passing by the character

black cast-iron lamp post with glowing warm light
dark water surface reflecting the foggy atmosphere
wet cobblestone pavement glistening in the lamplight

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a foggy cobblestone path beside a canal, passing ornate gas lamps and historic Victorian buildings. A policeman walks past in the opposite direction as the character approaches an intersection.

events.description: character stops walking and stands at the intersection, camera shifts to closer view
horse-drawn carriage with illuminated lamps emerges from the fog and passes along the street

agents.ego_description: standing still at the intersection, turning to watch the carriage pass and surveying the foggy surroundings

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn carriage with glowing yellow lamps moving through the fog from left to right

entered.detail: dark wooden carriage with two illuminated lamps and horse-drawn, moving through the mist
tall stone facades with multiple windows lining the right side of the street

segments.scene_description: The character stops at the intersection as the camera moves closer. The canal and lamp posts fall behind as a horse-drawn carriage with glowing lamps emerges from the fog and passes by. The character stands observing the carriage and the surrounding Victorian architecture.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a foggy riverside path that transitions from a steady walk into a stationary observation of the city's nocturnal traffic. It begins with the character traversing a cobblestone walkway beside a canal, passing ornate gas lamps and historic Victorian buildings as a policeman walks by in the opposite direction. As the character approaches an intersection, the camera moves closer, causing the canal and lamp posts to recede into the background. The scene then shifts focus as a horse-drawn carriage with glowing lamps emerges from the dense fog and passes through the frame. Finally, the camera settles on the character standing still, observing the carriage and the surrounding Victorian architecture under the dim streetlights.
